update_description:
✨ Performance & Playback Improvements

* Fixed bulk download issues for a smoother downloading experience 📥
* Added support for both music and video playback in the player 🎵🎬
* Enhanced the Home screen header with a cleaner and more polished design 🏠✨
* Fixed playback errors affecting some songs and videos ▶️🛠️
* Fixed Backup & Restore functionality for more reliable data recovery 💾🔄
* Improved player stability and overall app performance ⚡
* General bug fixes, UI refinements, and stability improvements 🚀
